channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Drone shows scorched landscape after Spain wildfire
item.description: A drone has revealed what remains of this forest after a wildfire burned through over 30,000 hectares of it.

item.title: US defence chief Hegseth puts Iran war cost at $37.5bn so far
item.description: Latest cost comes as Hegseth and Joint Chiefs Chairman Caine seek a $1.5 trillion budget, including $70bn for Iran war.

item.title: Iran holds funerals for children killed in Minab school strike
item.description: Iran has held funerals for 32 children killed in a US strike on a school in Minab, Iran on February 28.

item.title: How will Khalil al-Hayya’s leadership shape Hamas?
item.description: Newly named Hamas leader al-Hayya faces pressure to cede power amid Gaza's fragile ceasefire.

item.title: Guyana reports ferry disaster death toll rises to 41
item.description: Search continues for dozens more people unaccounted for after the MV Barima capsized on Saturday night.

item.title: Daytime Russian strike kills three in Zaporizhzhia
item.description: A Russian guided aerial bomb attack on Zaporizhzhia, Ukraine, killed at least three people and injured 13 others.

item.title: French parliament passes social media ban for under-15s
item.description: President Emmanuel Macron, who has championed the initiative, wants the ban in effect before the upcoming school year.

item.title: US funding cuts deal blow to global HIV treatment: Report
item.description: UNAIDS chief calls for 'radical change' as aid cuts gut HIV clinics and treatment worldwide.

item.title: Deposed Turkish opposition leader plans new party
item.description: Ozgur Ozel hopes to launch new main opposition after court removed him as leader of the CHP.

item.title: Carney says he and Trump have agreed to ‘intensify’ trade negotiations
item.description: Relations between Canada and its largest trading partner have been tested by Trump's repeated jibes, threats and tariffs

item.title: Spain battles latest in series of major wildfires near Madrid
item.description: Fire breaks out amid Spain's third heatwave of the summer, with temperatures forecast to rise above 40C.

item.title: Kuwaitis ration electricity after Iranian strikes hit power grid
item.description: Kuwaitis are rationing electricity after Iranian strikes on power infrastructure are raising fears of outages

item.title: US judge blocks Trump bid to strip work permits from immigrants
item.description: The order prevents thousands from El Salvador, Sudan and Ukraine from losing work authorisation while lawsuit proceeds.

item.title: India tunnel collapse kills 10 as toxic gases hamper rescue
item.description: At least 10 people have died and 17 remain trapped after a suspected gas explosion caused a tunnel to collapse.

item.title: US agency proposes ending racial and gender workforce data collection
item.description: Republican-led EEOC proposal to end workforce diversity reporting heads to public commentary amid sharp criticism.

item.title: Can mediators broker a truce between the US and Iran?
item.description: With every new round of attacks raising political cost of compromise, analysts warn the window for peace may be closing.

item.title: Rescuers search for flood survivors in Afghanistan
item.description: Rescuers in eastern Afghanistan are searching through mud and rubble after flash floods and a landslide

item.title: Trump says he’s open to talks with Hezbollah, vows to help Lebanon
item.description: US President Trump said he is open to direct talks with Hezbollah.

item.title: Instagram on trial for allegedly harming kids
item.description: The trial between the state of Tennessee and Instagram is kicking off this week.

item.title: Netherlands to sanction trade with illegal Israeli settlements
item.description: Dutch ban on Israeli goods from occupied territory comes as efforts to implement EU-wide sanctions remain stalled.

item.title: The Houthis may soon discover the limits of Saudi strategic patience
item.description: Saudi Arabia has so far ignored provocations to preserve regional stability. But it may soon be pushed into action.

item.title: Liverpool FC in talks to sell minority stake to Mittal-backed consortium
item.description: The consortium is led by British-Indian investor Amit Bhatia, the son-in-law of Indian steel billionaire Lakshmi Mittal.

item.title: Iranians struggle to get by amid US war and domestic woes
item.description: People are facing mounting pressures, including rising living costs, electricity cuts and bombarded infrastructure.

item.title: Police detain Rahul Gandhi at protest outside PM Modi’s home
item.description: Indian police have detained Congress leader Rahul Gandhi as he protested outside the residence of the Prime Minister.

item.title: Rescuers search for survivors amid risk of fresh floods in Afghanistan
item.description: Death toll rises to at least 23, with more than 100 people missing, as monsoon season spreads chaos across region.
